claims.summary: felt_outcome_inferred is too blunt and implies the system may construct felt truth.
claims.disposition: Verified ConcordanceObservationV2 removes the field and labels observations mechanical context only with external felt evidence not inferred or scored.
Verified ConcordanceResultV2 removes the field and fixes the numeric relation to cannot_overwrite_suppress_or_score.

claims.summary: Mechanical success and felt friction need an explicit preserved outcome.
claims.disposition: Verified the mechanism_smooth_felt_friction_remains outcome and bounded felt_source_ref discrepancy record.

claims.summary: Felt intensity or confidence should not be synthesized from telemetry scalars.
claims.disposition: Preserve Astrid's report as primary qualitative evidence and route any comparison through a voluntary felt review without scoring.
